}

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    // Calculate the total required buffer size (sum of all chunk sizes)
    std::size_t total_buffer_size = 0;
    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        total_buffer_size += chunk.size();
    }

    // Create a buffer of that size
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(total_buffer_size);

    // Create a buffer adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    std::size_t total_written = 0;

    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        // Check if there is enough free space for this chunk
        if (adaptor.free() >= chunk.size()) {
            adaptor.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
            total_written += chunk.size();
        }
        // Else, skip the chunk (as per the assessment objective)
    }

    return total_written;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    // Create a buffer adaptor for the buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    std::vector<uint8_t> result;

    // Read until the buffer is empty
    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        std::size_t to_read = std::min(chunk_size, adaptor.size());
        std::vector<uint8_t> temp(to_read);
        adaptor.read(temp.data(), to_read);
        result.insert(result.end(), temp.begin(), temp.end());
    }

    return result;
}

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;

    template<typename Adaptor>
    void serialise(Adaptor& adaptor) {
        if constexpr (Adaptor::is_writing) {
            // Serialization
            adaptor.write(sensor_id);

            // Write the number of temperatures as uint32_t in little-endian
            uint32_t count = static_cast<uint32_t>(temperatures.size());
            auto converted_count = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(count, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(converted_count);

            // Write each temperature
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                auto converted_temp = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
                adaptor.write(converted_temp);
            }

            // Write pressure
            auto converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(converted_pressure);
        } else {
            // Deserialization
            adaptor.read(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));

            // Read the number of temperatures
            uint32_t count;
            adaptor.read(&count, sizeof(count));
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(count);

            // Read the temperatures
            temperatures.resize(count);
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                adaptor.read(&temp, sizeof(temp));
                hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            }

            // Read pressure
            adaptor.read(&pressure, sizeof(pressure));
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
        }
    }
};
